title: echinocereus triglochidiatus subsp. coccineus
intro: Echinocereus triglochidiatus subsp. coccineus, commonly known as the red-spined hedgehog, is a cactus species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for wound healing and soothing skin irritations. The health benefits of Echinocereus triglochidiatus subsp. coccineus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote tissue repair, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include extracts and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
